ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING GRANTED. -COMMISSIONER PRO TEM DAVID L. HUARD-
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-08-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506.ALL PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO APPEAR IN COURT AT THE TIME AND PLACE SHOWN ABOVE.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY ROBINSON, ROSS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2009 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NIT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBINSON, ROSS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PROPSTRA, DONALD $2,275.00 PRINCIPAL, $114.00 INTEREST, $151.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,540.50, PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR TREBLE DAMAGES IS DENIED AS THERE WAS NO PROOF THAT PLAINTIFF SERVED DEFENDANT BY CERTIFIED MAIL WITH A WRITTEN DEMAND FOR PAYMENT UNDER CIVIL CODE 1719. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR ROBINSON, ROSS ASSIGNED TO ORANGE CAPITAL SOLUTIONS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT PROPSTRA, DONALD HEARING SET FOR MAR-01-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO DONALD PROPSTRA 350 LANSDALE AVE.,SF,CA. 94127, (415) 828-4455
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-01-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES.
